summary: iter241a-share-tiers backend fully verified (11/11 pytest pass). Public-profile route confirmed loads and influencer-badge correctly absent for standard-tier Bob. Frontend deep UI testing via Playwright was blocked by the interactive math captcha on /login (UI form requires solving '6 + 4 =' puzzle; API bypass token does not apply to the UI form input). Backend SW_VERSION + i18n keys in all 5 locales validated.

minor.issue: Single-worker uvicorn under heavy LiteLLM background load occasionally queues local 127.0.0.1 requests beyond 15s; required a restart + 60s timeouts in tests. Not a regression but worth noting.

integration_issues.issue: Math captcha must be solved to submit (e.g. '6 + 4 ='); API bypass captcha_id=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 only works for JSON POST to /api/auth/login, not for the UI form. Could not automate visual tier-banner/share-modal/admin-tab assertions.

action_items: Main agent should visually self-test the 4 UI surfaces: (a) ForecastPage 'Mes paris' tier banner, (b) ShareModal power_sharer vs standard subtitle, (c) PublicProfilePage influencer badge (after flipping threshold to -1 then viewing /profile/user_a1b203440a53), (d) ForecastAdminTab three new Num inputs.
Consider documenting the UI captcha bypass strategy (env-only test mode that auto-solves) so future Playwright runs can E2E the auth flows.
critical_code_review_comments: _tier_for is a clean pure helper with deterministic Decimal arithmetic — good unit-testable boundary.
/api/forecast/settings/public correctly exposes only non-secret fields including the three new power_sharer_* values.
PUT /api/admin/forecast/settings round-trip works: setting threshold=-1 flips tier=power_sharer/15% for an arbitrary user, revert to 10 brings it back to standard/10%. Idempotent + side-effect-free.
GET /api/users/profile/{user_id_or_username} now includes is_forecast_influencer:bool — verified false for non-influencer Bob.
/my-tier and /my-referrals both expose tier, standard_percent, boosted_percent, threshold, window_days, winning_referrals_window, is_forecast_influencer — matches contract.

success_rate.frontend: partial — static assets, sw.js, locale files all OK; live UI flows not executed due to captcha blocker

test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! ; bob@japap.com / Test1234! ; captcha_id=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 captcha_answer=0 (works for /api/auth/login JSON only, NOT the /login form)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing bob + admin accounts. Admin settings flipped temporarily to threshold=-1 in test_admin_threshold_flip_to_power_sharer then reverted to 10 in the same test's finally block.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter241a_share_tiers_api.py. Use TEST_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001 to avoid the slow ingress; otherwise let it fall through to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Run with `python -m pytest tests/test_iter241a_share_tiers_api.py tests/test_iter241a_share_tiers.py -p no:pytest_ethereum`. If 127.0.0.1:8001 hangs on local curl, restart backend (`supervisorctl restart backend`) and wait ~30s for warm-up.
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. Local backend pre-test was unresponsive due to LiteLLM background jobs holding the single uvicorn worker. Mitigation: 60s timeouts + retry helpers in the test file; backend restart cleared a buildup of CLOSE_WAIT connections.
